title: It Came from the Water
overview: Fed up with pandemics, quarantines and news about ecological disasters, worried about their own uncertain future and the fate of the world, a group of high school students are invited by Kamil, a millionaire's son, to a party at his father's seaside residance.

trailers.title: TO przyszło z wody... Nadchodzi APOKAWIXA 😈
